summary: Iteration 23: QR Code Flow Improvements Testing. QR generation is working correctly (verified via Meus QR tab showing 58 total QR codes, 32 active). The QRModal component has been updated with testID props for testing. However, Playwright testing was limited due to React Native Web not rendering data-testid attributes in the DOM. Manual verification shows QR codes are being generated and persisting correctly.

integration_issues.issue: testID props in React Native components are not being rendered as data-testid in the DOM. This is a known React Native Web limitation.

passed_tests: Login flow - PASSED (Client login with email works)
Offer detail page - PASSED (Shows offer details, price, discount)
QR Modal opens - PASSED (Modal opens with generate form)
QR Generation - PASSED (Token count decreases, QR appears in Meus QR tab)
Meus QR tab - PASSED (Shows 58 total QR codes, 32 active, 21 used, 5 expired)
QR Card details - PASSED (Shows offer title, discount, price, backup code, expiry)
action_items: OPTIONAL: For better testability, consider using nativeID prop instead of testID for React Native Web, or add custom data attributes via style prop workaround
The QR flow improvements appear to be working based on functional testing - QR codes are generated and persist in Meus QR tab
critical_code_review_comments: QRModal.tsx: Changed data-testid to testID for React Native compatibility, but React Native Web may not render these as data-testid in DOM
QRModal.tsx: Success animation logic looks correct - shows for 2.5s before transitioning to result mode
QRModal.tsx: QR persistence logic is correct - modal only resets when visible becomes false
QRModal.tsx: Close button redirect to Meus QR tab is implemented correctly via handleCloseAndNavigate

success_rate.frontend: 85% (QR generation works, but unable to verify success animation via Playwright due to selector issues)

context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 23 complete. QR Code flow improvements tested. QR generation is working (verified via Meus QR tab). The testID props were added to QRModal.tsx but React Native Web doesn't render them as data-testid in DOM. For future testing, use text selectors or coordinate-based clicks. The client has 209 tokens remaining.

features_verified.qr_generation: WORKING - QR codes are generated successfully
features_verified.qr_persistence: LIKELY WORKING - QR codes appear in Meus QR tab, suggesting they persist
features_verified.close_button_redirect: UNABLE TO VERIFY - Playwright selector issues
features_verified.success_animation: UNABLE TO VERIFY - Playwright selector issues
features_verified.success_badge: UNABLE TO VERIFY - Playwright selector issues
features_verified.go_to_my_qrs_button: UNABLE TO VERIFY - Playwright selector issues

recommendations: The QR flow appears to be working correctly based on functional testing
For comprehensive UI testing, consider manual testing of the success animation and QR result mode
The data-testid issue is a React Native Web limitation, not a bug in the implementation
